productDisplayName: Jockey ZONE Men Zone Grey Brief US14
description: Revel in the comfort of soft cotton with this bold brief from jockey. The superior cotton absorbent fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum support. Crafted from 100% premium combed cotton New high tech cushioned, broad and stretchable waistband in a contrast colour that sits snug and comfortably Double layered fly construction for maximum support and comfort Styled with good front and back coverage Low rise Fit Wash care Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade
